title: Pink Encrusted Golden Tools & Armor
description: This texture pack changes gold tools & armor to be encrusted with pink gems. These gems are close to enchantment glint pink color. Overall it makes gold tools look fancier.
body:
This texture pack changes gold tools & armor to be encrusted with pink gems. These gems are close to enchantment glint pink color. Overall it makes gold tools look fancier.

Bedrock version download:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/custom-golden-tools-bedrock/

Enjoy!
